title: Understanding Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments: A Plain-Language Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a talented Nigerian graphic designer wanting to sell your beautiful template collection, but PayPal has blocked your account due to 'geographic restrictions.' You've tried other platforms, but they either charge exorbitant fees or require you to jump through hoops for KYC verification. You're not alone. Many digital creators face similar challenges in Pakistan, Kenya, Ghana, and other countries. This post is for you.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling digital products – ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and more – with crypto payments used to be a complicated, high-risk endeavor. But with Unchained Commerce's solutions, you can now bypass traditional payment processors and sell your creations directly to customers worldwide without the hassle of KYC verification or geographic restrictions. This means more freedom, more flexibility, and more opportunities for your business to thrive.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) frontend wallet integration enables you to create multi-chain QR codes that allow buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrencies, such as BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300+ more. This seamless payment experience is facilitated by NOWPayments, our trusted payment processor that supports a vast array of cryptocurrencies and doesn't require buyers to create an account or undergo KYC verification.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The product types that work best with crypto-native delivery are any digital files that can be stored on a server and delivered via download link: ebooks in PDF or EPUB format, courses as video files or structured content packages, Notion templates as exported .notion files or share links, fonts as ZIP archives of OTF and TTF files, preset packs for Lightroom, Capture One, or DaVinci Resolve, beat files as WAV or MP3 archives, plugin installers, stock photo packs, and any other file-based product. The Core Shop Engine handles the delivery link generation and expiry, ensuring that download links are valid for a set time period and cannot be shared indefinitely after a single purchase.

Traditional payment processors may block your account due to geographical restrictions or KYC verification, but Unchained Commerce's solutions give you the freedom to sell your digital products worldwide.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is the backbone of our solution, providing a secure and automated delivery system for your products. The Admin Dashboard ($29.99) offers real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management, giving you complete control over your business. And with our Full Stack Bundle ($79.99), you get everything plus priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to get you up and running quickly.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started, sign up for our solutions and integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website. Create your QR codes, set your prices, and start selling your digital products. Monitor your sales and analytics using the Admin Dashboard, and enjoy the freedom to scale your business without the risk of traditional payment processors. Visit our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to explore our products and pricing plans.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell digital products without PayPal? Yes, with Unchained Commerce's solutions, you can sell your ebooks, courses, templates, and more directly to customers worldwide using crypto payments. Our technology bypasses traditional payment processors and supports a vast array of cryptocurrencies, making it easier to get paid and grow your business.
NOWPayments, our trusted payment processor, supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and doesn't require buyers to create an account or undergo KYC verification.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for ways to sell digital downloads without fees, sell ebooks without PayPal, or create a digital download store that accepts crypto payments only, Unchained Commerce has got you covered. Our solutions are designed to help you overcome the challenges of traditional payment processors and focus on what matters most – creating and selling your digital products. Check out our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration and start selling your creations today.
Your Action Checklist

To sell your digital products with crypto payments, follow these steps: Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website and create your QR codes; Set your prices and product descriptions; Start selling your digital products and monitor your sales and analytics using the Admin Dashboard; Enjoy the freedom to scale your business without the risk of traditional payment processors; Visit our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to explore our products and pricing plans.
